mapper.insert: INSERT INTO archive_document (archive_id, document_type, document_name, file_path, file_size, file_format, upload_time, uploader_id, uploader_name, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{archiveId}, #{documentType}, #{documentName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileFormat}, #{uploadTime}, #{uploaderId}, #{uploaderName}, #{description}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM archive_document WHERE archive_id = #{archiveId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM archive_document WHERE archive_id = #{archiveId}
